title.en: Five hundred to the end of the Dao era.

content.en:
Five hundred to the end of the Dao era.

"The purple stone and the sixth sequence of supreme rule items have all been exhausted, and the cultivation is also improving very slowly!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he still reluctantly raised the sixth sequence to the realm of seventy into one, which was very good.

Now that the day of the tribulation is not too far away, according to his estimates, he has decided to raise his cultivation to the late stage of the fivefold Dao realm during this period of time, and don't want to be promoted to the peak realm of the fivefold Dao realm.

Unless he enters other battlefields and kills a large number of Supreme Void Demons.

But the catastrophe is getting closer and closer, and the major battlefields are in a very calm state, and they don't want to expand the war situation.

Therefore, if he wants to go to other battlefields at this time, people will definitely not be willing.

Taisu Palace.

Ye Tian chatted face-to-face with the Taisu Palace Master and discussed the catastrophe.

"Ye Tian, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance has already issued an order, and after the 10,000 Solstice Dao Era, go to the Winter Night Fortress to garrison it to prevent the Supreme Dao Void Demon from invading in advance. "Taisu Palace Master said.

Ye Tian asked curiously, "Taisu Palace Master, why did the catastrophe happen, and why did the Supreme Dao Void Demon invade at all costs?"

"Because there are people who want to break through to the Dao Void Demon!" the Taisu Palace Master said helplessly: "If the Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon wants to break through to the Ninth Rank Dao Void Demon, it needs to comprehend the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, but it is too difficult to comprehend the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and devouring the Innate Origin Origin can not only make their bloodlines transform, but also make it possible to realize the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules." Therefore, the Supreme Dao Void Demon had to invade the Innate Origin Domain at all costs. "

"Then why don't you invade with all your strength now?" Ye Tian was surprised.

The master of the Taisu Palace said: "Because during the tribulation period, the origin of the Innate Origin Domain is all silent, and it is impossible to resist the Dao Void Demon, and it is easier to devour. It is precisely because of this that the Supreme Dao Void Demon will not give up this great opportunity. The period of the Tribulation is 10,000 Solsday Epocalypse, and after this time, the Tribulation will pass, and it will be impossible for the Supreme Dao Void Demon to continue to attack. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

In other words, once the tribulation is defeated, those many innate primordial domains will be destroyed by the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

And chatting with the Taisu Palace Master, Ye Tian also knew that in the last tribulation, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance had lost more than eighty Innate Origin Domains, and there were many Eightfold Dao Realms that had fallen, not to mention the Sevenfold Dao Realm, and the number of Fallen was countless!

It was precisely because of this that those Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms in the Infinite Domain were so panicked.

"Our Wuji Domain used to belong to Luohe Fortress, but now it is divided into Winter Night Fortress, and on the day of the calamity, will the Supreme Dao Void Demon directly invade our Wuji Domain?" Ye Tian asked.

The Taisu Palace Lord smiled slightly, and immediately transformed into the image of the Winter Night Fortress.

In the image, the Winter Night Fortress formed pillars of light across the void, enveloping the Innate Primordial Domains.

"Each fortress has arranged a large array of innate origin domains, and the entire large array protects one innate origin domain after another, if the fortress is not broken, the innate origin domain will not be broken. Previously, the Luohe Fortress was breached, but the more than a dozen innate domains that represented the protection of the Luohe Fortress had lost their protection. But now, the more than a dozen Innate Origin Domains under the command of Luohe Fortress have been sheltered by the Winter Night Fortress again, so naturally everything will be fine!"

"The Winter Night Fortress has sheltered more than seventy Innate Origin Domains, and its strength is much stronger than the original Luohe Fortress. Luohe Fortress is just a small fortress, and the Innate Origin Alliance doesn't attach much importance to it, and there are not many resources in this area, so it doesn't have much impact. "

As soon as the Taisu Palace Master explained this, Ye Tian completely understood.

At this moment, he finally understood the importance of the fortress.

Any fortress is a shelter of the Innate Origin Domain, and once the shelter is broken, it is equivalent to losing its defenses and allowing the Supreme Void Demon to invade.

Of course.

Even if there is a shelter, the Supreme Dao Void Demon can invade and enter the Innate Origin Domain at a certain price, such as those battlefields.

It's just that they can't devour the origin of the Innate Origin Domain, so they can't completely destroy the Innate Origin Domain, and such an invasion can only be regarded as a small fight.

For example, if there is a fortress, the invasion difficulty is 100, and if there is no fortress, the invasion difficulty may be 1, and if there is a fortress, the innate origin can be transferred and supported by each other.

If there was no fortress, from this Innate Origin Domain to other Innate Origin Domains, they would only have to shuttle through the Void Domain, and they would naturally be easily blocked by the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

"Taisu Palace Master, you can arrange it, I want to garrison the Winter Night Fortress in advance!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

The Taisu Palace Master didn't ask why, Ye Tian wanted to go, so she naturally went to arrange it.

And the reason why Ye Tian wanted to garrison the Winter Night Fortress was naturally to improve his strength faster.

The Winter Night Fortress was able to have direct contact with the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and he stayed in the Infinite Domain, and many good things could not be touched, such as the purple stone, which he still didn't know what it was.

If you enter the Winter Night Fortress, you may be able to find out what the purple stone is.

With enough purple stones, he can improve his sixth sequence to the Dao rules, and maybe he can also exchange them for resources that can quickly improve his cultivation, which is much better than staying in the Infinite Domain honestly.

Of course, it must be dangerous to garrison the fortress, but he doesn't care about that.

Soon after, a summons came from the Taisu Palace Master, informing him that it had been arranged and that he could enter the Winter Night Fortress, but he had to choose a position.

Taisu Palace's status was too low, so Ye Tian could only choose two positions.

One is a fortress guard, and the other is a fortress patrol.

The fortress guards are stationed at each node of the fortress, controlling the Innate Origin Domain Great Array to ensure that the Great Array has been operating normally.

There is nothing dangerous about this position, as long as the fortress is not broken, they will not fall, and once the fortress falls, they will also be the first to die!

The Fortress Patrol is dangerous, and it needs to patrol the surrounding Void Domain area, for example, if there is a large-scale invasion of the Void Demon of the Supreme Dao, the Patrol Envoy is also the first to know, and then report it, so that the fortress has enough time to react.

Ye Tian did not hesitate to choose the fortress patrol envoy.

Although the fortress patrol makes this job dangerous, it also has the opportunity to obtain a lot of combat merits and resources, while the fortress guards have no chance of meritorious service, and they are very boring, and there is no way to quickly improve their strength.

Therefore, only the fortress patrol makes it suitable for Ye Tian.

this day.

Ye Tian's true body copied his body from the Infinite Domain to the Winter Night Fortress, although this was not the first time he went to the Winter Night Fortress, but he had only used this place as a transit before, and he had never even gone out of the transit hall.

This time, he is the one who really enters the Winter Night Fortress.
